title: Nomad Style
description: A world that encourages players to explore outward, with mechanics that make traveling everywhere more than just a dream.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ttE0oWcPpvU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Embark on a nomadic, ever-adventurous survival journey:

- Majestic landscapes
- Challenging dungeon structures
- Unique mechanics made for nomadic lifestyle
- Custom skill trees for [Pufferfish's Skills](https://modrinth.com/mod/skills)
- Campfires that grow ever stronger!

體驗看看一個居無定所、不停冒險的生存之旅。

- 壯麗的地形
- 充滿挑戰的地牢結構
- 為流浪打造的生存的機制
- 自製的[Pufferfish's Skills](https://modrinth.com/mod/skills)技能樹
- 營火變得更強大！
